narrative:
Hamilton Twp E (precinct in Warren County) has 1,126 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
